basic_details.short_information: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) has recruits 1 Yoga Instructor Post. Candidates With BNYS/BAMS, MSc (Yoga), MPhil (Yoga), PG Diploma in Yoga, Certificate in Yoga, PhD in Yoga Can Apply Offline. The offline application closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply through NAM Kerala website, nam.kerala.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: BNYS/BAMS, MSc (Yoga), MPhil (Yoga), PG Diploma in Yoga, Certificate in Yoga from YCB/SCOLE Kerala, PhD in Yoga

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nam.kerala.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
